# Copilot Instructions — pikappoint.com

Static marketing landing page for **PikAppoint**. No framework, no build step — a single self-contained HTML file plus a few static assets, published by GitHub Pages.

## Architecture

- **`docs/` is the entire published site.** GitHub Pages is configured to deploy from branch `main`, folder `/docs`. Anything outside `docs/` (README, `package.json`, root `CNAME`) is *not* served.
- **`docs/index.html` is the whole landing page (~1500 lines).** All CSS lives in one `<style>` block in `<head>`; all JS lives in one `<script>` block near the end. There are no external CSS/JS files and no bundler — edit this file directly.
- **Scroll-reveal animation:** sections start at `opacity: 0` and are revealed by an `IntersectionObserver` that adds a class as they enter the viewport. Consequence: a full-page screenshot without scrolling shows mid-page sections as blank — this is expected, not a bug. The page renders normally in a real browser.
- **Assets in `docs/`:** `calendar-icon.svg` (SVG favicon + source of truth for the icon), `favicon.ico` (ICO fallback, generated from the SVG), `robots.txt`, `404.html`, `CNAME`.

## Local preview

```sh
npm start        # runs: npx http-server docs -p 8080 -c-1  → http://127.0.0.1:8080
```

There is no test or lint tooling and no `node_modules` — `npm start` is the only script. Use `127.0.0.1`, not `localhost` (http-server binds IPv4; `localhost` may resolve to IPv6 `::1` and fail).

## Conventions

- **In-page app links** in `index.html` (Sign Up, Browse, Help, Terms, etc.) point at the live app on `https://app.pikappoint.com` (the landing page itself is served from `www.pikappoint.com`). Keep app/auth/legal links pointing at that subdomain — only `/` (brand) and asset links (`/calendar-icon.svg`, `/favicon.ico`) are relative to this site.
- **Favicon = the SVG.** `favicon.ico` must visually match `docs/calendar-icon.svg`. It was generated by rasterizing the SVG at 16/32/48px and wrapping the PNGs in an ICO container (no ImageMagick available — Playwright was used to rasterize). If you change the icon, regenerate the `.ico` to match rather than hand-editing it.
- **Custom domain:** the deploy-time `CNAME` must live at the published root, i.e. `docs/CNAME` (`www.pikappoint.com`). Keep it in `docs/`.
- **Content origin:** the landing page was copied from the `time-craft-scheduler-admin` project (the PikAppoint app repo). Substantive copy/design changes may need to stay in sync with that source.

## Deploying

Commit and push to `main`; GitHub Pages serves `docs/` automatically. No CI build runs.
